## Checklist

- [ ] I opened an issue first for anything beyond a small fix.
- [ ] `npm run build && npm run test:local && npm run dogfood:all` pass locally.
- [ ] Site checks pass if I touched the website (`npm run build:site && npm run site:check`).
- [ ] **Every commit is signed off** (`git commit -s`) per the [DCO](../DCO) — see the
      [sign-off guide](../docs/contributing/dco-guide.md).
- [ ] My contribution is submitted under the Apache License 2.0 (CONTRIBUTING.md §9).
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal/customer data are included.
- [ ] Any third-party material I added is compatibly licensed, with attribution preserved.
